sourceTitle: Generative AI Usage Guidelines | Information Technology Services Office
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Users shall not use generative AI tools for any unlawful, harmful, or malicious activities, including but not limited to fraud, harassment, defamation, or infringement of rights.
